title: Lead SEO Specialist at Shiprocket Capital India

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Shiprocket Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shiprocket Capital India family as a SEO Specialist in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shiprocket Capital India:
Shiprocket Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket Capital India!
